rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Production Of Disposition Documents.
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner Donna Castro and American Cancer Society's Motion to compel further responses to production of documents at deposition: The objection pursuant to California Rule of Court 377 is overruled. On the Court's own motion, the hearing is continued to March 13, 2006 at 9:00 a.m. to permit counsel for the deponent to file a substantive opposition. = (610/BEC)
